elements.title: lang::report_page_048_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ue.userid)                                          users,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.userid)                                       as completed,
       ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.userid) / COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ue.userid), 2) as progress
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       INNER JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_cc.userid = kbi_ue.userid AND kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND kbi_e.status = 0
GROUP BY kbi_c.id, kbi_c.fullname
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname
